Name: Pyomo
Description: Pyomo is an open-source Python package for modeling and solving equation-oriented optimization problems, enabling users to define variables, constraints, and objectives and solve them using various solvers, including LP, NLP, and MILP.

Name: FOQUS
Description: Framework for Optimization and Uncertainty Quantification

Name: IDAES-PSE
Description: IDAES core Python framework and model library

Name: Parameter Sweep
Description: Toolkit to solve Pyomo models multiple times with different values for parameters, optionally in parallel

Name: WaterTAP-REFLO
Description: An extension of WaterTAP that incorporates renewable energy (RE) models for RE-driven desalination systems

Name: Flowsheet Processor
Description: API for exporting flowsheets to the Flowsheet Processor UI

Name: Flowsheet Processor UI
Description: Graphical UI for configuring and running any IDAES flowsheet

Name: IDAES Flowsheet UI
Description: Self-contained, one-click-installer graphical application for interacting with IDAES flowsheets

Name: WaterTAP Flowsheet UI
Description: Self-contained, one-click-installer graphical application for interacting with WaterTAP flowsheets

Name: PrOMMiS Flowsheet UI
Description: Self-contained, one-click-installer graphical application for interacting with PrOMMiS flowsheets
